description_long: This is a military tank with a robust, angular hull and a large, centrally mounted turret featuring a long barrel cannon. The vehicle is painted in a matte olive drab color with white markings, including the number '206' on the turret sides and a white stripe running horizontally. The tank is equipped with wide, rugged tracks supported by multiple road wheels on each side, designed for traversing rough terrain. Cylindrical external fuel tanks or storage canisters are mounted on the rear sides, and there is a visible antenna on the turret. The front of the tank is heavily armored with sloped plating, and the rear features engine grilles and additional armor. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility, typical of mid-20th-century main battle tanks.
description: A heavily armored olive drab tank with a large turret, long cannon, and white military markings, supported by wide tracks and multiple road wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped frontal armor, central cannon, and symmetrical track layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long barrel, turret with '206' marking, and the full set of road wheels and tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the engine grilles, rear armor, cylindrical canisters, and the back of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, and track system, with '206' marking visible.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with pronounced sloped armor on the front and turret; appears thick and continuous with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab paint with a white horizontal stripe and white numbers; no complex camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: White number '206' on both sides of the turret and a white horizontal stripe; no other insignia or symbols visible.
